$comment: c76 (D-AS-REGALLOC-WIDE-CALL-OPERAND-COUNT, option E; 2026-07-01): a wide call THROUGH a function pointer composes two invariants: (1) the pre-regalloc wide-call materialization (lir_wide_call_args.cpp) splits the >6-arg overflow to `store_outgoing_arg` carriers; (2) the indirect callee register must survive arg setup (FC4-c2) — the pass must not reuse the callee-pointer register as an arg-move scratch or `call *reg` jumps to garbage. WITNESS: `probe` takes 9 int params (a7..a9 overflow the 6 SysV GPR arg registers); values descending 9..1 weight 1..9 make each position distinct value AND weight, so a swap, a wrong overflow-slot read, OR a clobbered callee pointer changes the exit code. sum_{k=1..9}(10-k)*k = 165. RED-ON-DISABLE: revert the pass -> error[L_VirtualRegInPostRegalloc]. Int-only, so the release arm is safe. => 165.
